programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard's grandparents have recently passed, and together with his mom, Claire, James must help decide the future of the family home; the house is full of memories but also outdated, with a small kitchen and a layout that doesn't showcase its views; working with his team-construction manager Ryan and designer and realtor Megan-James aims to renovate and restore the home for top dollar.

programme.desc: Less is mostly more in Brea; Rene swings for the fences on a costly gamble; Brandi has to dig through trash but really puts her heart into it nonetheless; Ivy and Pops clear up confusion over a massive, mysterious mechanism.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A life coach is sued for defamation of character after allegedly posting "before" pictures of a former client; a woman sues her daughter for unpaid school expenses after discovering she received a sizeable loan from the government.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie's Aunt Miranda and her friends are caught investigating an investment fraud scheme, so it's up to Charlie and Rex to get to the source of the fraud.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex seeks help from Detective Sidney Scott to save his stranded and injured friends.

programme.title: Top of the Block
programme.desc: Three suburban houses compete in a battle to see whose house rules the street.

programme.title: Andy's East Coast Kitchen Crawl
programme.desc: Andy tours Dartmouth for local sushi, legendary chowder and hard cider stops.

programme.title: CityNews at 6 Vancouver
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan transports an inmate, who happens to be his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring and dangerous escape.

programme.title: A Priceless Love
programme.desc: Rose McGovern realizes that one of the items in her secondhand store is actually an antique teapot worth $80K. An ambitious antique broker tries to buy the piece from her, but she's determined to find the original owner.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie gets a break in a long-unsolved kidnapping case that has haunted him, but runs into trouble when the abductee refuses his help.

programme.title: CityNews Tonight Vancouver
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Everything seems like business as usual in West Covina, Calif., until a crazy-looking vintage Mercury Zephyr pulls up, revealing an old friend; Darrell and his buddy stumble over the ultimate sketch artist; Ivy and his son can't seem to pick a lane.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a regular father and son shootout in Victorville, Calif., as Ivy and Pops try to prove who among them is the most profitable; Brandi's secret weapon lands her more than she bargained for, but luckily Kenny is there to brighten her day.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man forces his heirs to wear masks at a Mardi Gras party to receive their inheritance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A down-at-the heels ventriloquist is the victim of both his gangster-like dummy and a strangely evil little girl.

programme.desc: An ensemble sitcom focusing on a mixed batch of black women who face life's tests and triumphs together.
